message:
fix(session): update tests to use collect module for proc_stat parsing

The session.rs tests were referencing `ProcStat::parse` and
`read_proc_stat` which no longer exist after refactoring. Updated
tests to use `parse_proc_stat` and `parse_proc_stat_content` from
the collect module.

Changes:
- Import parse_proc_stat and parse_proc_stat_content from crate::collect
- Update test_proc_stat_parse and test_proc_stat_parse_with_spaces_in_comm
  to use parse_proc_stat_content
- Update test_read_proc_stat_current_process to use parse_proc_stat
- Added #[cfg(target_os = "linux")] guards to platform-specific tests
- Extended test content strings to include required fields (20+ fields)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
